plugins.name: Vault
plugins.author: Misty
plugins.overview: Vault provides encrypted, deduplicated backups powered by restic.
capabilities: Host backup controls in the native launcher
Keep restic-specific setup outside Misty core
Prepare a future surface for scheduling and restore
permissions: Future filesystem read access for selected backup roots
Future shell access to run restic
getting_started: Launch Vault to configure backups once available.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Moved Vault out of core and into a plugin placeholder.

plugins.name: yt-dlp
plugins.author: Misty
plugins.overview: yt-dlp brings YouTube downloading into Misty without leaving the app.
capabilities: Convert downloads into MP3, M4A, MP4, or WEBM
Save media into sensible local destinations
where_it_appears: Files tabs when launched from Files
permissions: Write access to local download folders
Shell access to invoke yt-dlp and FFmpeg
getting_started: Install yt-dlp and FFmpeg on the host machine.
Open it in Misty and paste a YouTube URL.
changelog: v0.1.0 - Added a native Misty yt-dlp panel with audio and video presets.
